entities.name: ICML11

entities.description: The crop species to which ICML11 belongs

entities.name: SELFING
entities.description: A breeding method involving self-pollination used to derive ICML11

entities.description: A selection method used to derive ICML11

entities.description: The country of origin for accession IP2696

entities.name: PUCCINIA PENNISETI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen causing rust in pearl millet

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by Puccinia penniseti

entities.name: RPP1
entities.description: A single dominant gene that controls resistance to Puccinia penniseti

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location where trials for ICML11 were conducted

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen to which ICML11 is resistant
